risk_rules.name: auth_or_permissions
risk_rules.suggestion: Include authorization, ownership, tenant, and negative-path tests.

risk_rules.name: api_contract
risk_rules.suggestion: Include status code, response shape, and compatibility checks.

risk_rules.name: database_or_migration
risk_rules.suggestion: Include migration, rollback, idempotency, and data preservation checks.

risk_rules.name: ui_flow
risk_rules.suggestion: Consider component interaction and approved Playwright/browser flow coverage.

risk_rules.name: billing_or_side_effect
risk_rules.suggestion: Mock external side effects and verify idempotency/audit behavior.
